# PHASESoundEvent.PrepareHandlerReason.prepared

**Case**

Indicates the completion of sound-event preparation.

## Declaration

```swift
case prepared
```

## Reasons

- **PHASESoundEvent.PrepareHandlerReason.terminated**: Indicates sound-event preparation stops abruptly.
- **PHASESoundEvent.PrepareHandlerReason.failure**: Indicates an error occurs during sound-event preparation.

items.description: Indicates an error occurs during sound-event preparation.
